entries.name: stock_fm_baseline
entries.notes: Stock baseline remains part of the release bar, even though the current corpus blocker is on modified decks.

entries.name: pse2025_high_parity_quick
entries.notes: Current repaired public quick-deck anchor. This is the only corpus entry with a complete release packet so far.

entries.name: jg_baseline
entries.notes: Represents the JG-heavy modified-deck lane called out in the release plan.

entries.name: pse2025_base_parity_quick
entries.notes: Tracked quick PSE variant for expanding beyond the repaired high deck.

entries.name: pse2025_low_parity_quick
entries.notes: Tracked quick PSE variant for expanding beyond the repaired high deck.

entries.name: fpr_raw_input_demo
entries.notes: Useful as a lightweight raw-input smoke, but not sufficient for release on its own.
